seo.description: LNA extracts structured data from any PDF and exports it to Excel automatically. AI-powered document processing with 99.5% accuracy. Request a demo.
seo.ogDescription: Extract structured data from PDFs into Excel — automatically.

features.title: LNA Features — AI Document Processing & Intelligent Data Extraction
features.description: Explore LNA's full feature set: AI data extraction, PDF to Excel export, LLM-powered Q&A, and context-aware AI roles. See what sets LNA apart.

pricing.title: LNA Pricing — Plans for Every Team Size
pricing.description: Simple, transparent pricing for LNA's AI document processing platform. Starter from $49/mo. Free trial available on all plans. No credit card required.

about.title: About LNA — Intelligent Document Processing by Manureva Solutions

footer.description: AI-powered document processing that turns PDFs into structured Excel data — automatically.

hero.heading: Turn Any PDF Into Perfect Excel —
hero.description: LNA uses AI to extract, structure, and export data from your documents in seconds — so your team stops copying and starts working.
hero.noCard: No credit card required. Up and running in minutes.
hero.imageAlt: LNA platform dashboard showing PDF to Excel conversion

speed.headline: 10x Faster Processing
speed.description: Replace hours of manual data entry with AI extraction that completes in seconds.

accuracy.headline: 99.5% Extraction Accuracy
accuracy.description: Confidence scoring on every field ensures your data is reliable before it ever leaves the platform.

zeroManual.headline: Zero Manual Entry
zeroManual.description: From upload to export, the entire workflow is automated — your team never touches the raw data.

anyFormat.headline: Any Document, Any Format
anyFormat.description: Invoices, reports, forms, statements — LNA handles them all, including scanned PDFs.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.heading: From Upload to Excel in Three Steps
howItWorks.subheading: No configuration required. No templates to build. Just results.

step1.label: Upload
step1.title: Drop In Your Documents
step1.description: Drag and drop single files or entire batches of PDFs directly into LNA. Bulk upload handles hundreds of documents at once. LNA auto-classifies each file so you stay organized from the start.

step2.label: Extract
step2.title: AI Does the Heavy Lifting
step2.description: LNA's AI reads every page, identifies tables, entities, and data fields, and structures everything into clean rows and columns. Confidence scoring flags anything that needs a second look — so nothing slips through.

step3.label: Export
step3.title: Download Perfect Excel Files
step3.description: Map extracted data to your own Excel template or download it as-is. Preview before you export. Every output includes a full audit trail, so your team always knows what was extracted and when.

features.label: Features
features.heading: Everything Your Team Needs to Process Documents at Scale
features.subheading: Six core capabilities built for finance teams, operations managers, and anyone who lives in spreadsheets.

organize.title: Organize Every Document in One Place
organize.description: Upload, classify, search, and preview all your PDFs without leaving the platform. LNA automatically detects duplicates and keeps your library clean, with full-text search across your entire document archive.

aiExtraction.title: AI That Reads Documents Like an Expert
aiExtraction.description: Schema-free extraction means you don't need to configure anything before processing starts. LNA detects dates, amounts, names, addresses, and multi-page tables automatically — with a confidence score attached to every field.

templateMatch.title: Your Excel Format, Automatically Matched
templateMatch.description: Upload your existing Excel template and LNA proposes the field mappings for you. Fine-tune with a visual drag-and-drop editor, then save the configuration for every future batch — your templates, your way.

export.title: Export With Confidence
export.description: Preview your output before downloading. Export to Excel in formats that preserve your layout and formulas. Every extraction is logged in a full audit trail, giving your team the traceability compliance requires.

askDocuments.title: Ask Your Documents Anything
askDocuments.description: Stop hunting through spreadsheets for answers. Ask LNA a plain-language question — "What was the total invoice amount from Vendor X in Q3?" — and get an accurate, sourced answer from your own data in seconds.

aiAssistant.title: An AI Assistant That Speaks Your Industry
aiAssistant.description: Set a role — Financial Analyst, Compliance Officer, Operations Manager — and LNA's AI adapts its language, focus, and responses to match. It's not a generic chatbot. It's domain-aware intelligence built into your workflow.

aiDifferentiators.label: What Makes LNA Different
aiDifferentiators.heading: Beyond Extraction: Document Intelligence That Thinks
aiDifferentiators.subheading: Most document tools stop at extraction. LNA keeps going — giving you the ability to question, analyze, and reason over your data using AI that understands your context.

qa.title: Ask Your Documents Anything
qa.description: Connect your document library to a powerful language model and query it in plain English. LNA grounds every answer in your actual data — no hallucinations, no guesswork.
qa.bullet1: Ask natural-language questions across hundreds of documents at once
qa.bullet2: Get specific, sourced answers — not summaries or approximations
qa.bullet3: Instantly surface totals, comparisons, anomalies, and trends without building a single formula

roles.title: AI That Adapts to Your Role
roles.description: Configure the AI to think and respond like an expert in your field. Whether you need financial analysis, compliance review, or operational oversight, LNA's context roles make every conversation relevant and precise.
roles.bullet1: Pre-built roles: Financial Analyst, Compliance Officer, Operations Manager
roles.bullet2: The AI speaks your industry's language — not generic output
roles.bullet3: Build and save custom roles tailored to your specific workflows

socialProof.label: Trusted by Teams Who Process Documents Every Day

sarah.quote: LNA replaced our entire manual data entry workflow. What used to take our team 6 hours a day now happens in minutes — with better accuracy.
sarah.name: Sarah Chen
sarah.title: Finance Director

james.name: James Okafor
james.title: Operations Manager

marie.quote: The LLM Q&A feature changed everything. We can now ask questions across thousands of invoices instead of manually building pivot tables.
marie.name: Marie Dubois
marie.title: Head of Data

cta.heading: Stop Copying. Start Extracting.
cta.description: LNA automates the PDF-to-Excel workflows that are costing your team hours every week. See it in action with a personalized demo — we'll show you exactly how it works with your documents.
cta.microcopy: No credit card required. Setup takes minutes. Cancel anytime.

hero.heading: Every Tool You Need to Process Documents Without the Busywork
hero.description: LNA combines intelligent data extraction, automated Excel export, and AI-powered document analysis into one platform — so your team can focus on decisions, not data entry.

documentManagement.label: Document Management
documentManagement.headline: One Place for Every Document Your Team Processes
documentManagement.description: Managing hundreds of PDFs across shared drives and email threads creates confusion. LNA gives your team a centralized document workspace where every file is organized, searchable, and accessible — from upload to archive.
documentManagement.bullet1: Drag-and-drop multi-file upload, including bulk batches of hundreds of documents
documentManagement.bullet2: Automatic document classification — LNA distinguishes invoices, reports, forms, and statements without setup
documentManagement.bullet3: Built-in OCR processes scanned and image-based PDFs as accurately as digital-native files
documentManagement.bullet4: Intelligent duplicate detection prevents redundant processing and keeps your library clean
documentManagement.bullet5: Full-text search across your entire document archive so nothing gets buried

dataExtraction.label: Data Extraction
dataExtraction.headline: AI Extraction That Gets It Right the First Time
dataExtraction.description: Traditional OCR tools copy text. LNA understands structure. Its AI reads each document the way an analyst would — identifying tables, recognizing entities, and structuring output into clean, usable data rows without any manual configuration required.
dataExtraction.bullet1: Schema-free extraction: no templates or field mapping needed to start processing
dataExtraction.bullet2: Automatically detects entities — dates, monetary amounts, vendor names, addresses, and more
dataExtraction.bullet3: Multi-page table extraction handles complex financial and operational reports accurately
dataExtraction.bullet4: Confidence scoring on every extracted field so you know exactly what to trust and what to verify
dataExtraction.bullet5: Batch processing handles hundreds of documents in a single run, with error recovery and retry on failure
dataExtraction.bullet6: Structured output is ready to map and export immediately — no cleanup, no reformatting

templateMapping.label: Template & Mapping
templateMapping.headline: Your Excel Template. LNA's AI Does the Matching.
templateMapping.description: You've already built your reporting templates. LNA respects that. Upload your existing Excel file, and the AI analyzes its structure and proposes how extracted fields should map to your columns — automatically. Tweak it once, save it forever.
templateMapping.bullet1: Upload any .xlsx template as your target output format
templateMapping.bullet2: AI-powered structure analysis reads your template and understands column intent
templateMapping.bullet3: Auto-mapping proposals suggest field-to-column matches — accept them in one click
templateMapping.bullet4: Visual drag-and-drop mapping editor for manual corrections without code
templateMapping.bullet5: Save mapping configurations as reusable templates for recurring document types
templateMapping.bullet6: Template library lets your team standardize workflows across departments and projects

exportAudit.label: Export & Audit
exportAudit.headline: Export Data You Can Trust — With a Paper Trail to Prove It
exportAudit.description: An extraction is only valuable if the output is reliable. LNA gives you a full preview of every export before you download it, delivers format-preserving Excel files that fit directly into your existing workflows, and logs every action for traceability.
exportAudit.bullet1: Format-preserving Excel export maintains your template layout, column widths, and structure
exportAudit.bullet2: Export preview lets you review output before it leaves the platform
exportAudit.bullet3: Batch export processes and downloads multiple documents simultaneously
exportAudit.bullet4: Full audit trail captures what was extracted, what was mapped, by whom, and when — supporting compliance and review processes

llmQa.label: LLM-Connected Data Q&A
llmQa.headline: Stop Searching. Start Asking.
llmQa.description: Spreadsheets are good at storing data. They're not good at answering questions. LNA's LLM-connected Q&A turns your document library into a conversational data source. Ask anything in plain English and get an accurate answer — grounded entirely in your own uploaded data, not generic AI knowledge.
llmQa.whyItMattersText: Most document tools stop at extraction. They give you a spreadsheet and leave you to figure out the rest. LNA goes further — once your data is extracted, it stays live and queryable. Your documents become a database you can have a conversation with.
llmQa.bullet1: Ask natural-language questions across your entire document library
llmQa.bullet2: Answers are grounded in your uploaded data — not the LLM's general training
llmQa.bullet3: Get specific totals, comparisons, summaries, and anomaly flags without writing a single formula
llmQa.bullet4: Ideal for: financial reconciliation, compliance checks, vendor analysis, operational reporting
llmQa.bullet5: Powered by Gemini — a state-of-the-art language model built for accuracy at scale

chatContextRole.label: Chat with Context Role
chatContextRole.headline: An AI That Thinks Like Your Team
chatContextRole.description: Generic AI gives generic answers. LNA's Chat with Context Role lets you configure the AI assistant's persona and domain focus — so it responds with the expertise your work actually requires.
chatContextRole.whyItMattersText: Context roles don't just change the tone of responses — they change what the AI pays attention to. This is the difference between a general-purpose chatbot and a specialized AI partner that understands your industry.
chatContextRole.bullet1: Pre-built roles include Financial Analyst, Compliance Officer, and Operations Manager
chatContextRole.bullet2: The AI adapts its language, focus areas, and interpretation to match the selected role
chatContextRole.bullet3: Create and save custom roles tailored to your specific team, department, or use case
chatContextRole.bullet4: Combine with LLM Q&A for end-to-end document intelligence: extract, query, and analyze in one platform
chatContextRole.bullet5: Roles are organization-level — share them across your team for consistent AI behavior

userManagement.label: User Management
userManagement.headline: Secure Access, Clear Roles, Full Control
userManagement.description: LNA is built for teams. Organization-level accounts, role-based permissions, and JWT authentication ensure that the right people have access to the right documents — and the audit trail always knows who did what.
userManagement.bullet1: JWT-based authentication for secure, token-managed access
userManagement.bullet2: Organization-level accounts keep your team's data fully separated from other customers
userManagement.bullet3: Role-based access control with Admin, Editor, and Viewer permission levels
userManagement.bullet4: Admins manage team members, permissions, and billing from a central dashboard
userManagement.bullet5: Enterprise tier supports SSO/SAML for single sign-on integration with your existing identity provider

comparison.heading: There's a Better Way Than Copy-Paste
comparison.footer: Manual processes don't scale. Basic OCR tools don't understand your data. LNA does both — and then gives you an AI layer on top that turns your documents into something you can actually reason over.

cta.heading: Ready to See LNA in Action?
cta.description: Book a 30-minute demo and we'll walk you through the platform using your document types. No slides. No scripts. Just a live demonstration of exactly what LNA can do for your team.

hero.heading: Simple Pricing. Serious Results.
hero.description: Every plan includes core AI extraction and Excel export. Upgrade when you need LLM Q&A, context roles, and deeper team controls.

q1.question: Is there a free trial?
q1.answer: Yes. All paid plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card is required to start. You get full access to all features in your chosen plan during the trial period — so you can evaluate everything before committing.

q2.question: How does billing work?
q2.answer: You can choose monthly or annual billing. Monthly billing is charged at the start of each billing cycle. Annual billing is charged once per year and saves you up to 20% compared to monthly rates. You'll receive an invoice by email for every payment.

q3.question: Can I cancel at any time?
q3.answer: Yes. You can cancel your subscription at any time from your account settings. If you cancel a monthly plan, you retain access until the end of the current billing period. If you cancel an annual plan, your access continues until the end of the annual term — we do not offer pro-rata refunds on annual billing.

q4.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
q4.answer: Absolutely. You can upgrade at any time — the change takes effect immediately and you'll be billed a prorated amount for the remainder of your billing cycle. Downgrades take effect at the start of your next billing period.

q5.question: Who owns my data?
q5.answer: You do. All documents you upload and all data extracted by LNA belong entirely to you. We do not use your documents to train AI models. Your data is stored securely and can be exported or deleted at any time. For full details, please review our Privacy Policy and Data Processing Agreement.

q6.question: Is LNA secure and compliant?
q6.answer: LNA is built with security as a foundation. We use encrypted storage, secure API connections, and JWT-based authentication. Organization-level data isolation ensures your data is never accessible to other customers. Enterprise customers can request our full security documentation, and we offer a DPA for GDPR compliance requirements.

q7.question: What counts as a "document"?
q7.answer: A document is one PDF file submitted for processing. Whether the PDF is 1 page or 100 pages, it counts as a single document. Re-processing the same file after corrections counts as a new document submission. Uploaded files that are stored but never processed do not count against your monthly limit.

q8.question: Does LNA have an API?
q8.answer: API access is available on the Enterprise plan. It allows you to integrate LNA's extraction, mapping, and export capabilities directly into your own systems and workflows. Contact our sales team for API documentation and integration scoping.

cta.heading: Not Sure Which Plan Is Right for You?
cta.description: Talk to our team. We'll help you figure out the right fit based on your document volume, team size, and workflow — no pressure, no sales script.

hero.heading: Built to End the Copy-Paste Era
hero.description: LNA exists because professionals deserve better than spending their day re-entering data by hand. We built an AI platform that processes documents the way a careful analyst would — accurately, automatically, and at scale.

problem.label: The Problem
problem.heading: Millions of Hours Lost to a Spreadsheet That Should Fill Itself
problem.p1: Every day, finance teams, operations managers, and data analysts sit down to do the same thing: open a PDF, look at the numbers, and type them into a spreadsheet. Invoice by invoice. Row by row. Page by page.
problem.p2: It's slow. It's error-prone. And it scales with headcount, not with ambition — the more documents you process, the more people you need doing it.
problem.p3: Organizations lose thousands of hours annually to this workflow. Errors compound — a misread digit on an invoice, a missed row in a report, a field copied to the wrong column — and the cost shows up in audits, reconciliations, and decisions made on bad data.
problem.p4: LNA was built specifically to solve this. Not with a workaround. Not with a complicated configuration process. With genuine AI that reads documents the way you would — and outputs structured, accurate, exportable data automatically.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To eliminate manual document processing for every organization that depends on data — by making intelligent, AI-powered extraction accessible, accurate, and immediately usable.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: A world where no professional loses productive time to data entry — where documents are not just readable, but fully queryable, analyzable, and actionable from the moment they arrive.

values.label: What We Stand For
values.heading: The Principles Behind Every Decision We Make

accuracyFirst.title: Accuracy First
accuracyFirst.description: Data that can't be trusted is worse than no data at all. We build confidence scoring, audit trails, and verification mechanisms into everything LNA does — because your decisions depend on getting it right.

aiPurpose.title: AI with Purpose
aiPurpose.description: We don't add AI features because they're impressive. We add them because they solve a real problem. Every AI capability in LNA — from schema-free extraction to context roles — exists because it makes your work meaningfully better.

customerCentric.title: Customer-Centric by Default
customerCentric.description: Our customers are people who process documents for a living. We build for their actual workflows — the templates they've already created, the formats their systems expect, the questions they need to ask of their data.

transparency.title: Transparency in Every Output
transparency.description: LNA shows its work. Every extracted field carries a confidence score. Every export includes an audit trail. We believe that automation should be explainable — so you're never in the dark about what the AI did and why.

innovation.title: Continuous Innovation
innovation.description: The technology behind document AI is evolving fast, and so are the needs of the teams we serve. We're committed to releasing meaningful improvements consistently — not as marketing moments, but as genuine expansions of what LNA can do for you.

team.label: The Team
team.heading: The People Building LNA
team.description: We're a focused team at Manureva Solutions, working to make document intelligence accessible to every organization that relies on data.

company.label: The Company
company.heading: A Product by Manureva Solutions
company.p1: LNA is developed and maintained by Manureva Solutions — a software company dedicated to building practical, AI-powered tools for professional workflows.
company.p2: Manureva Solutions operates from two locations: Paris, France and Pondicherry, India. Our team brings together expertise in AI engineering, enterprise software, and product design, with a shared focus on building tools that solve real operational problems.
company.p3: LNA is our flagship product — and a direct reflection of our belief that AI should reduce effort, not add complexity. Every feature we ship is designed to make the work of data-intensive professionals a little faster, a little more accurate, and a lot less frustrating.
company.p4: To learn more about Manureva Solutions or explore partnership opportunities, reach out to us at hello@getlna.com

cta.heading: Want to See What LNA Can Do?
cta.description: Book a demo and we'll walk you through the platform live — using your document types, your templates, and your questions.

hero.heading: Let's Talk
hero.description: Whether you're ready for a demo, have a question about pricing, or want to explore a partnership — we're here. We typically respond within 24 hours.

sidebar.heading: Other Ways to Reach Us
sidebar.emailNote: We respond within 24 hours on business days.

privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how Manureva Solutions ("we," "us," or "our") collects, uses, and protects information when you use LNA ("the Platform"). We are committed to protecting your privacy and handling your data responsibly.

s1.heading: 1. Information We Collect
s1.intro: We collect information in the following categories:
s1.accountDesc: Name, email address, company name, and role when you create an account or request a demo.
s1.documentDesc: PDF files and documents you upload for processing. See Section 3 for details on how we handle document data.
s1.usageDesc: Information about how you interact with LNA, including pages visited, features used, and session duration.
s1.technicalDesc: Browser type, device information, IP address, and operating system.

s2.heading: 2. How We Use Your Information
s2.b1: Provide and maintain the LNA platform
s2.b2: Process your documents and deliver extraction results
s2.b4: Improve our services and develop new features
s2.b5: Respond to your inquiries and provide support

s3.heading: 3. Document Data Processing
s3.intro: Your documents are processed solely to provide extraction and analysis services. We want to be clear about how we handle your document data:
s3.ownershipDesc: All documents you upload and all data extracted by LNA belong entirely to you.
s3.noTrainingDesc: We do not use your documents or extracted data to train AI models.
s3.isolationDesc: Organization-level data isolation ensures your data is never accessible to other customers.
s3.encryptionDesc: Documents are encrypted at rest and in transit using industry-standard encryption protocols.

s4.heading: 4. Data Storage & Security
s4.intro: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data, including:
s4.b1: Encrypted storage for all documents and extracted data
s4.b2: Secure API connections with JWT-based authentication
s4.b3: Regular security audits and vulnerability assessments
s4.b4: Role-based access control within the platform
s4.b5: Organization-level data isolation for multi-tenant environments

s5.heading: 5. Data Sharing
s5.intro: We do not sell your personal information or document data. We may share information with:
s5.serviceProvidersDesc: Third-party services that help us operate the platform (e.g., cloud infrastructure, analytics).
s5.legalRequirementsDesc: When required by law, regulation, or legal process.
s5.businessTransfersDesc: In connection with a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets.

s6.heading: 6. Your Rights
s6.intro: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the following rights:
s6.b4: Export your data in a portable format
s6.b5: Object to certain data processing activities
s6.exerciseRights: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at
s6.gdpr: For GDPR-related requests, we offer a Data Processing Agreement (DPA) for Enterprise customers.

s7.heading: 7. Cookies & Tracking
s7.intro: We use cookies and similar technologies for:
s7.essentialDesc: Required for the platform to function (e.g., authentication, session management).
s7.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how the platform is used so we can improve it.
s7.manage: You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings.

s8.heading: 8. Data Retention
s8.text: We retain your data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide services. Document data can be exported or deleted at any time from your account settings. After account deletion, we remove your data within 30 days, except where retention is required by law.

s9.heading: 9. Changes to This Policy
s9.text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes via email or through the platform. Continued use of LNA after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

s10.heading: 10. Contact Us
s10.intro: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, contact us at:

s2.text: LNA is an AI-powered document processing platform that extracts structured data from PDF documents and exports it to Excel format. The Service includes document upload, AI-powered data extraction, template mapping, export capabilities, and related features as described on our website.

s5.intro: Your data belongs to you. All documents you upload and all data extracted by LNA remain your property. We do not claim any ownership rights over your content.
s5.b1: We do not use your documents to train AI models
s5.b2: You can export or delete your data at any time
s5.b3: Upon account termination, your data will be deleted within 30 days
s5.footer: For details on how we handle your data, see our

s8.text: The Service, including its software, design, documentation, and branding, is the property of Manureva Solutions and is protected by intellectual property laws. You may not copy, modify, distribute, or create derivative works based on the Service without our prior written consent.

Our total liability for any claim arising from these Terms shall not exceed the amount paid by you to us in the 12 months preceding the claim.

s10.text: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless Manureva Solutions from any claims, damages, or expenses arising from your use of the Service, your violation of these Terms, or your violation of any rights of a third party.
